Listener.name: 1 - Incoming Raw File - Dir Listener - NSP - NSR & FMF & HIC

Processor.name: Transform charges csv to xml - NSP
Save charges xml for later - charges - NSP
Go pickup demographics csv for this charges file from input directory - NSP
Transform ap demographics csv to xml - NSP
Save charges xml for later - demos - NSP
Concat All Records From both sets of cp and ap files together - NSP
Remove the temp attrs to store ap and cp files into memory - NSP

Source.name: Pickup Flat Files - PPS - CGJ & PGJ

Listener.name: 1 - Incoming Raw File - Dir Listener - PPS - CGJ & PGJ

Processor.name: Transform charges csv to xml - PPS
Save charges xml for later - charges - PPS
Go pickup demographics csv for this charges file from input directory - PPS
Transform ap demographics csv to xml - PPS
Save charges xml for later - demos - PPS
Concat All Records From both sets of cp and ap files together - PPS
Remove the temp attrs to store ap and cp files into memory - PPS

Processor.name: Flat File to HL7 and Kickout Reports.1 - Incoming Flat Files by Partition and Client.Processor17
Set Facility Name - FPS - AP Logs
Translate facility code ap to client name

ModuleConfig.AttributePairs: [eip_pair:ClientName:eip_name:{ognl:getAttribute('FacilityCode') == 'COCYS' ? 'REA' : getAttribute('FacilityCode') == 'COCSS' ? 'STB' : getAttribute('FacilityCode') == 'COCCC' ? 'CHJ' : getAttribute('FacilityCode') == 'COCTC' ? 'JRN' : getAttribute('FacilityCode') == 'COCJW' ? 'JWI' : getAttribute('FacilityCode') == 'COCHR' ? 'HEO' : getAttribute('FacilityCode') == 'COCPD' ? 'PAS' : getAttribute('FacilityCode') == 'COCRD' ? 'REU' : getAttribute('FacilityCode') == 'COCSAA' ? 'SPP' : 'NONE'}:eip_value]

Processor.name: Remove xml header line because it makes it invalid xml when wrapping

Listener.name: 1 - Incoming Raw File - Dir Listener - ARA - ARA - LigoLab

Processor.name: Since it's XML when we combine streams we need to wrap it in a root XML node

Listener.name: 1 - Incoming Raw File - Dir Listener - PPA - LMG

Processor.name: Replace N with tilde with N-Copy-3
Transform ap charges csv to xml
Save charges xml for later - ap charges
Go pickup ap demographics csv for this charges file from input directory
Replace N with tilde with N
Transform ap demographics csv to xml
Save charges xml for later - ap demos
Go pickup cp demographics csv for this charges file from input directory
Replace N with tilde with N-Copy-1
Transform cp demographics csv to xml
Save charges xml for later - cp demos
Go pickup cp charges csv for this charges file from input directory
Replace N with tilde with N-Copy-2
Transform cp charges csv to xml
Save cp charges xml for later
Concat All Records From both sets of cp and ap files together
Remove the temp attrs to store ap and cp files into memory
Merge from multiple files - final merging process from input side
Group Patient Demos and Charges by Account Number
Generate Charges Missing Demos Kickout Report

Transport.name: 1 - Incoming Raw File.Route to Route Transport

Processor.name: Flat File to HL7 and Kickout Reports.3b - Generate HL7 Files.Processor10-Copy-1
Set Partition and Client Name-NGP-CAQ (Health First)

ModuleConfig.ExecuteProcessor: {ognl:(getAttribute('ClientName') != 'NOA' && getAttribute('ClientName') != 'LAM' && getAttribute('ClientName') != 'MAX' && getAttribute('ClientName') != 'NFX' && getAttribute('ClientName') != 'OCX' && getAttribute('ClientName') != 'PUX' && getAttribute('ClientName') != 'PAT' && getAttribute('ClientName') != 'POT' && getAttribute('ClientName') != 'FRK' && getAttribute('ClientName') != 'SPG' && getAttribute('ClientName') != 'REA') && getAttribute('ClientName') != 'REC' && getAttribute('ClientName') != 'STB' && getAttribute('ClientName') != 'PPA' && getAttribute('ClientName') != 'ARA' && getAttribute('ClientName') != 'JFX' && getAttribute('ClientName') != 'LWX' && getAttribute('ClientName') != 'PWX' && getAttribute('ClientName') != 'COX' && getAttribute('ClientName') != 'ALI' && getAttribute('ClientName') != 'SPP' && getAttribute('ClientName') != 'REU' && getAttribute('ClientName') != 'PAS' && getAttribute('ClientName') != 'JWI' && getAttribute('ClientName') != 'JRN' && getAttribute('ClientName') != 'HEO' && getAttribute('ClientName') != 'CHJ' && getAttribute('ClientName') != 'STF' && getAttribute('ClientName') != 'NEO' && getAttribute('ClientName') != 'AP' && getAttribute('ClientName') != 'CAQ' && getAttribute('ClientName') != 'HMD' && getAttribute('ClientName') != 'TON' && getAttribute('ClientName') != 'CMX' && getAttribute('ClientName') != 'KIX' && getAttribute('ClientName') != 'CYX' && getAttribute('ClientName') != 'HWX' && getAttribute('ClientName') != 'CAX' && getAttribute('ClientName') != 'GUX' && getAttribute('ClientName') != 'WAX' && getAttribute('ClientName') != 'WFX' && getAttribute('ClientName') != 'TWX' && getAttribute('ClientName') != 'HAX' && getAttribute('ClientName') != 'HAA' && getAttribute('ClientName') != 'LGX' && getAttribute('ClientName') != 'PXL' && getAttribute('ClientName') != 'ALX' && getAttribute('ClientName') != 'MNX' && getAttribute('PartitionName') != 'PPS' && getAttribute('PartitionName') != 'NSP' && (getAttribute('is_csv') == null || getAttribute('is_csv') != 'true')}

{ognl:getAttribute('FacilityName') != 'HCA AP Logs' && (getAttribute('ClientName') == 'NOA' || getAttribute('ClientName') == 'LAM' || getAttribute('ClientName') == 'MAX' || getAttribute('ClientName') == 'NFX' || getAttribute('ClientName') == 'OCX' || getAttribute('ClientName') == 'PUX' || getAttribute('ClientName') == 'PAT' || getAttribute('ClientName') == 'POT' || getAttribute('ClientName') == 'FRK' || getAttribute('ClientName') == 'REA' || getAttribute('ClientName') == 'REC' || getAttribute('ClientName') == 'STB' || getAttribute('ClientName') == 'JFX' || getAttribute('ClientName') == 'LWX' || getAttribute('ClientName') == 'PWX' || getAttribute('ClientName') == 'COX' || getAttribute('ClientName') == 'ALI' || getAttribute('ClientName') == 'SPP' || getAttribute('ClientName') == 'REU' || getAttribute('ClientName') == 'PAS' || getAttribute('ClientName') == 'JWI' || getAttribute('ClientName') == 'JRN' || getAttribute('ClientName') == 'HEO' || getAttribute('ClientName') == 'CHJ' || getAttribute('ClientName') == 'HMD'|| getAttribute('ClientName') == 'TON' || getAttribute('ClientName') == 'CMX' || getAttribute('ClientName') == 'KIX' || getAttribute('ClientName') == 'CYX' || getAttribute('ClientName') == 'HWX' || getAttribute('ClientName') == 'CAX' || getAttribute('ClientName') == 'GUX' || getAttribute('ClientName') == 'TWX' || getAttribute('ClientName') == 'WAX' || getAttribute('ClientName') == 'WFX' || getAttribute('ClientName') == 'LGX' || getAttribute('ClientName') == 'PXL' || getAttribute('ClientName') == 'ALX' || getAttribute('ClientName') == 'MNX' && (getAttribute('is_csv') == null || getAttribute('is_csv') != 'true') && getAttribute('ClientName') != 'SPG' && getAttribute('ClientName') != 'PPA' && getAttribute('ClientName') != 'NEO' && getAttribute('ClientName') != 'AP' && getAttribute('ClientName') != 'ARA' && getAttribute('ClientName') != 'ALI') && getAttribute('ClientName') != 'STF' && getAttribute('ClientName') != 'HAX' && getAttribute('ClientName') != 'HAA' && getAttribute('PartitionName') != 'PPS' && getAttribute('PartitionName') != 'NSP'}

Processor.name: Transform Stamford Flat File to XML
PPA NEO XML to GED XM
NGP AP XML to GED XML
NGP Health First CAQ XML to GED XML
HAL HAX CP XML to GED XML
HAL HAA AP XML to GED XML

ModuleConfig.ExceptionMessage: {ognl:'You are attempting to process different facilities at the same time. Please check the file contents and file name, then reupload.'}

Processor.name: Flat File to HL7 and Kickout Reports.1 - Incoming Flat Files by Partition and Client.Processor4-Copy-1

ModuleConfig.ExceptionMessage: {ognl:'You are attempting to process the wrong facility based on the filename. Please check the file contents and file name, then reupload.'}

Processor.name: Flat File to HL7 and Kickout Reports.1 - Incoming Flat Files by Partition and Client.Processor8
Write Orig Transformed XML to Disk
Blank Admit Date and Discharge Date - First Available - GLF Expanse ONLY
